languages.text: "Лорд-капитан, станция Тиркуаз-4 не принимает вокс-сигналы с орбиты. {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}Авгуры{/g} фиксируют, что уровень воды на станции значительно превышает допустимый".

traits.locale_text: "Лорд-капитан, станция Тиркуаз-4 не принимает вокс-сигналы с орбиты. {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}Авгуры{/g} фиксируют, что уровень воды на станции значительно превышают допустимый".

languages.text: "Lord Captain, Tirkuaz-4 is not receiving vox-signals from orbit. Our {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} are registering that the water level around the station far exceeds the norm."
languages.original_text: "Лорд-капитан, станция Тиркуаз-4 не принимает вокс-сигналы с орбиты. {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}Авгуры{/g} фиксируют, что уровень воды на станции значительно превышает допустимый".

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain, Tirkuaz-4 is not receiving vox-signals from orbit. Our {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} are registering that the station's water levels far exceed the norm."
"Lord Captain, Tirkuaz-4 is not receiving vox-signals from orbit. Our {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} are registering that the water level around the station far exceeds the norm."
"Lord Captain, Tirkuaz-4 is not receiving vox-signals from orbit. The station head's call signs are silent as well. Our augurs are registering that the station's water levels far exceed the norm."
"Lord Captain, Tirkuaz-4 is not receiving vox-signals from orbit. Our {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} are registering that the station's water levels far exceed the norm."
"Lord Captain, Tirkuaz-4 is not receiving vox-signals from orbit. Our {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} are registering that the station's water levels far exceed the norm."
"Lord Captain, Tirkuaz-4 is not receiving vox-signals from orbit. Our {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} are registering that the water level around the station far exceeds the norm."

languages.text: 「提督、ティルクアズ4は軌道からのボイス信号を受信できていません。基地長のコールサインも静かです。我々の観測装置は、基地の水位が基準値をはるかに超えていることを示しています」
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, Tirkuaz-4 is not receiving vox-signals from orbit. The station head's call signs are silent as well. Our augurs are registering that the station's water levels far exceed the norm."

traits.locale_text: 「提督、ティルクアズ4は軌道からのボイス信号を受信できていません。基地長のコールサインも静かです。我々の観測装置は、基地の水位が基準値をはるかに超えていることを示しています。」

languages.text: «Lord Capitán, Tirkuaz-4 no recibe señales de voco de la órbita. Los {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augures{/g} registran que el nivel del agua en torno a la estación excede drásticamente la normativa».
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, Tirkuaz-4 is not receiving vox-signals from orbit. Our {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} are registering that the water level around the station far exceeds the norm."

traits.locale_text: «Lord Capitán, Tirkuaz-4 no recibe señales de voco de la órbita. Los {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augures{/g} registran que el nivel del agua en torno a la estación excede drásticamente la normativa».

languages.text: "Lord Captain, Tirkuaz-4 empfängt keine Voxsignale aus dem Orbit. Laut unserer {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}Auguren{/g} übersteigt das Wasserniveau im Umfeld der Station die Normwerte deutlich."
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, Tirkuaz-4 is not receiving vox-signals from orbit. Our {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} are registering that the water level around the station far exceeds the norm."

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain, Tirkuaz-4 empfängt keine Voxsignale aus dem Orbit. Laut unserer {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}Auguren{/g} übersteigt das Wasserniveau im Umfeld der Station die Normwerte deutlich."

languages.text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, Tirkuaz-4 ne reçoit pas les signaux-vox envoyés depuis l'orbite. D'après nos {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augures{/g}, le niveau de l'eau à proximité de la station est bien plus élevé que d'ordinaire. »
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, Tirkuaz-4 is not receiving vox-signals from orbit. Our {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} are registering that the water level around the station far exceeds the norm."

traits.locale_text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, Tirkuaz-4 ne reçoit pas les signaux-vox envoyés depuis l'orbite. D'après nos {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augures{/g}, le niveau de l'eau à proximité de la station est bien plus élevé que d'ordinaire. »

languages.text: “舰长大人，提库阿兹4号已无法接收来自轨道的音阵信号。我方{g|Encyclopedia:Augur}俄歇矩阵{/g}侦测到，星站周围的水位远超正常水平。”
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, Tirkuaz-4 is not receiving vox-signals from orbit. Our {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} are registering that the water level around the station far exceeds the norm."

traits.locale_text: “舰长大人，提库阿兹4号已无法接收来自轨道的音阵信号。我方{g|Encyclopedia:Augur}俄歇矩阵{/g}侦测到，星站周围的水位远超正常水平。”

languages.text: "Tirkuaz-4, yörüngeden gelen voks sinyallerini almıyor Lord Kaptan. {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}Alametlerimiz{/g}, istasyonun etrafındaki su seviyesinin normların çok üzerinde olduğunu kaydediyor."
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, Tirkuaz-4 is not receiving vox-signals from orbit. Our {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} are registering that the water level around the station far exceeds the norm."

traits.locale_text: "Tirkuaz-4, yörüngeden gelen voks sinyallerini almıyor Lord Kaptan. {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}Alametlerimiz{/g}, istasyonun etrafındaki su seviyesinin normların çok üzerinde olduğunu kaydediyor."
